questions.q: According to a study reported on April 28, 2026, taking a daily supplement of which vitamin increased the rate of complete cancer disappearance in breast cancer patients undergoing chemotherapy by 79%?

According to a study from the Feinberg School of Medicine covered on April 28, 2026, artificial intelligence models scored higher than physicians in generating what type of comprehensive medical documents?
On April 28, 2026, NTT DATA announced the launch of a new brain health monitoring service that generates a cognitive health score by using AI to analyze what type of data?
